project_type: Next.js 16 App Router marketplace with Supabase backend
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files or test runner in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run pnpm lint and tsc --noEmit to confirm no type errors or lint failures
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can install packages. No Supabase instance for integration testing. Node v22, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: Branch is fix/signup-email-confirmation-callback. Follow existing patterns in src/features/auth/actions/ for server actions.
key_patterns: Server actions use 'use server' directive, createClient() from @/lib/supabase/server, return {error?: string} or redirect. Form components are client components using React state. Features organized in src/features/<domain>/components/ and src/features/<domain>/actions/. UI components in src/components/ui/. DB types defined in src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.
directory_structure: src/features/<domain>/{actions,components}/ for feature code, src/app/ for routes, src/lib/supabase/ for DB client and types, src/constants/ for roles/permissions, src/components/ui/ for shared UI primitives
